name: DSGC Baseline Morphology (141009_Pair1DSGC), Diameter-Calibrated
short_description: Diameter-calibrated mouse ON-OFF DSGC morphology: topology from dsgc-baseline-morphology, per-Strahler-order radii from Poleg-Polsky & Diamond 2016.
size_description: 6,736 compartments (19 soma + 6,717 dendrite), 129 branch points, 131 leaves, 1,536.25 um total dendritic length; Strahler-order-calibrated diameters from Poleg-Polsky & Diamond 2016 ModelDB 189347 (Hanson geoffder/Spatial-Offset-DSGC-NEURON-Model mirror). Four distinct radii: soma 4.118 um, primary 3.694 um, mid 1.653 um, terminal 0.439 um.

files.description: Diameter-calibrated SWC. Topology (ids, parents, xyz, compartment count, branch points, leaves, total dendritic length) copied verbatim from dsgc-baseline-morphology. Radii assigned from Poleg-Polsky & Diamond 2016 by Horton-Strahler order with max-child tie-break: soma 4.118 um (mean of non-endpoint pt3dadd soma diameters / 2, clamped to 0.5 um floor), primary 3.694 um (order==max_order=5), mid 1.653 um (intermediate orders), terminal 0.439 um (order==1). Terminal radius floor 0.15 um.
